item.description:
# AI Usage Battery 0.2.3 (Build 7)
This patch release fixes account-switching usage bleed and reduces memory pressure during local Codex and Claude usage refreshes.
## Changes
- Limits Codex and Claude usage detection to activity recorded after the currently detected account credential was updated. - Stops reusing cached usage snapshots when the detected provider account id changes. - Removes archived Codex sessions from the default rate-limit scan path. - Avoids duplicate scanning when a configured source path already contains another source path. - Narrows Claude default transcript scanning to concrete usage sources instead of recursively walking the whole Claude config directory. - Replaces the Codex probe helper's broad recursive `rg` scan with bounded recent-file tail reads. - Keeps stale Claude statusline and probe cache output from applying after an account switch.
## Verification
- Swift test suite passes. - Probe helper shell syntax validates. - Xcode release build is expected to remain Developer ID signed, notarized, stapled, Gatekeeper assessed, and packaged with the existing verified DMG Finder layout flow.
